name: Purple Pesto
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Opal or Purple Ruffle basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except olive oil in a blender or food processor.
2. Slowly add the olive oil while blending to achieve the desired consistency.
3. Toss the pesto on freshly cooked pasta. This variation pairs well with sauteed strips of sweet Italian peppers and linguine.
